Moncton Coliseum
Moncton, New Brunswick, Canada
April 5, 1997

Unidentified taper
Source/Lineage: no info

01.	Crash On The Levee (Down In The Flood) [04:47]
02.	I Want You [06:46]
03.	All Along The Watchtower [06:36]
04.	Positively 4th Street [08:42]
05.	Watching The River Flow [08:19]
06.	Silvio (Bob Dylan & Robert Hunter) [07:52]
07.	Oh Baby It Ain't No Lie (Elizabeth Cotton) [05:46]
08.	Desolation Row [10:27]
09.	Don't Think Twice, It's All Right [09:22]
Total time [68:37]

10.	God Knows [06:47]
11.	She Belongs To Me [08:30]
12.	Highway 61 Revisited [09:50]
13.	Like A Rolling Stone [09:20]
14.	It Ain't Me, Babe [08:49]
15.	Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35 [07:01]
Total time [50:17]

Concert # 856 of The Never-Ending Tour
Third concert of the 1997 Spring Tour of Canada and USA
1997 concert # 14

Third concert with the 11th Never-Ending Tour Band:
Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar)
Bucky Baxter (pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar)
Larry Campbell (guitar)
Tony Garnier (bass)
David Kemper (drums & percussion)

7-9, 14 acoustic with the band
2, 5, 9 Bob Dylan harmonica
6, 15 Larry Campbell & Bucky Baxter (backup vocal)

NOTE:  Due to Bob's equipment being held up off the coast of Newfoundland the date of this show was changed from April 4th to April 5th

BobTalk:
A friend of mine passed away, I guess this morning, that was one of his favorite songs, poet Allen Ginsberg (after Desolation Row)

7 new songs (46%) compared to previous concert
6 new songs for this tour
